label: source_file
description: Source document filename or identifier used to trace electrochemical records.

label: electrochemical_system
description: Electrochemical system or task such as energy storage, electrocatalysis, water splitting, oxygen reaction, or carbon dioxide reduction.

label: working_electrode
description: Working electrode substrate, geometry, or electrode type.

label: active_material
description: Active material, catalyst, coating, or electrode material under evaluation.

label: electrolyte
description: Electrolyte composition and concentration. Verify units and solvent or aqueous basis manually.

label: reference_electrode
description: Reference electrode used for potential reporting. Potential conversions require manual verification.

label: counter_electrode
description: Counter electrode material or configuration when reported.

label: cell_configuration
description: Cell setup such as two-electrode, three-electrode, flow cell, membrane cell, or coin cell.

label: loading_mg_cm2
description: Active material loading in mg/cm2. Verify area basis and normalization.

label: potential_window_v
description: Potential or voltage window in V. Check reference electrode and cell configuration.

label: current_density_ma_cm2
description: Current density in mA/cm2. Verify geometric, mass-normalized, or other basis.

label: overpotential_mv
description: Overpotential in mV. Confirm reference scale and benchmark current density.

label: tafel_slope_mv_dec
description: Tafel slope in mV/dec if reported. Verify fitting range manually.

label: capacity_mah_g
description: Specific capacity in mAh/g for battery-type measurements when reported.

label: specific_capacitance_f_g
description: Specific capacitance in F/g for supercapacitor measurements when reported.

label: cycle_number
description: Cycle number used for stability, retention, or durability reporting.

label: capacity_retention_percent
description: Capacity or activity retention in percent after cycling or durability testing.

label: scan_rate_mv_s
description: Scan rate in mV/s for cyclic voltammetry or related measurements.

label: test_temperature_c
description: Test temperature in Celsius when reported.

label: performance_metric
description: Primary performance metric reported for the system. Verify unit, normalization, and test condition.

label: data_source_location
description: Location of the extracted value, such as table, figure, caption, or experimental section.

label: notes
description: Short caveats about reference scales, normalization, units, or manual review needs.
